papers.title: RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control
papers.summary: A vision-language-action model that transfers web-scale semantic knowledge into robot control policies. Seed entry; run the fetch script for current arXiv records.

papers.title: Diffusion Policy: Visuomotor Policy Learning via Action Diffusion
papers.summary: Uses diffusion models for multimodal action generation in visuomotor imitation learning, with strong results on manipulation benchmarks. Seed entry; verify metadata before citation.

papers.title: Open X-Embodiment: Robotic Learning Datasets and RT-X Models
papers.summary: Introduces a large cross-embodiment robotics dataset and RT-X models for transferable robot policies. Seed entry; run automated refresh for current details.
